sections.paragraph: (“pitching,” sc. or tents), [Tekoa, Tekoch], pr.n. of a fortified town to the south east of Bethlehem, on the borders of the great desert (תְּקֹועַ מִדְבַּר 2Ch 20:20 compare 1Ma_9:33 ), 2Sa 14:2 1Ch 2:24 Jer 6:1 Amo 1:1 Gr. Θεκωέ, 1Ma_9:33 . Relandi Palæstina, p. 1028. Ruins are still found there, bearing the ancient name (Legh, in Macmichael’s Journey, p. 196.) [Gent. noun תְּקֹועִי 2Sa 14:4 1Ch 11:28 Neh 3:5.]
